gmail.name: Gmail
gmail.notes: Consumer Gmail attachment limit per message (Google Workspace may differ by admin policy).

outlook-web.name: Outlook on the web
outlook-web.notes: Default limit for Outlook.com / OWA attachments unless tenant policy overrides.

canvas-lms.name: Canvas LMS
canvas-lms.notes: Common default upload cap on Canvas course assignments (institution-configurable).

blackboard.name: Blackboard Learn
blackboard.notes: Typical assignment upload ceiling on many Blackboard Ultra courses.

usps-online.name: USPS online forms
usps-online.notes: Many federal and municipal portals enforce single-file PDF caps near 10 MB.
